UserAccount.title: UserAccount
UserAccount.description: Stores user account information for the VogueVerse website.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user account.

email.description: The email address associated with the user account.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

googleId.description: The Google ID associated with the user account, if the user signed up via Google.

registrationDate.description: The date and time when the user registered.

loyaltyPoints.description: The number of loyalty points the user has accumulated.

postalCode.description: The user's postal or zip code.

prizeLabel.description: The label of the currently active prize from the prize wheel.

prizeExpiry.description: The Unix timestamp (in milliseconds) when the current prize expires.

Complaint.title: Complaint
Complaint.description: Stores a customer complaint or issue.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Stores a product review from a customer.

definition.description: Stores user account information. The 'userId' is the Firebase Authentication UID, ensuring only the authenticated user can access their data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, obtained from Firebase Authentication (request.auth.uid).

firestore.reasoning: This Firestore data structure focuses on storing user account information, complaints, and reviews. It follows the recommended practices of clarity, security, and scalability. The structure uses a path-based ownership model for user data stored in the `/users/{userId}` collection. Authentication is handled by Firebase Authentication, and the `userId` obtained from `request.auth.uid` is used to secure access to user-specific data. The `complaints` collection allows anyone to submit an issue, while the `reviews` collection allows any user to submit a review.
